executives.name: Andrew Power
executives.background: Mr. Power has served as our President since 2021 and our Chief Executive Officer since 2022. He previously served as our Chief Financial Officer from 2015 to 2022. Prior to joining Digital Realty, he was Managing Director at Bank of America Merrill Lynch.

executives.name: Matt Mercier
executives.background: Mr. Mercier has served as our Chief Financial Officer since 2023. He joined Digital Realty in 2006 and has held various roles, including Senior Vice President, Global Finance and Corporate Planning.

executives.name: Christopher Sharp
executives.background: Mr. Sharp has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2015. Prior to joining Digital Realty, he held leadership positions at Equinix.

executives.name: Cindy Fiedelman
executives.background: Ms. Fiedelman has served as our Chief People Officer since 2016. Previously, she held human resources leadership roles at American Airlines and Avaya.

executives.name: Jeannie Lee
executives.background: Ms. Lee has served as our Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since 2022. She joined Digital Realty in 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Mary Hogan Preusse
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hogan Preusse has served as Chairman of the Board since 2022. She was formerly Managing Director and co-head of Americas Real Estate at APG Asset Management US.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Power
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of Digital Realty Trust, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Laurence Chapman
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Financial Officer of Goodrich Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: VeraLinn Jamieson
board_of_directors.background: Retired Lieutenant General, United States Air Force.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Kennedy
board_of_directors.background: Former President and Chief Executive Officer of Avaya Inc.
